name: hidden-eye
description: Hidden Eye Anti-Spy Camera Detector PWA & Native App

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html style.css app.js manifest.json sw.js sujal_mishra.jpg shubhanshu_singh.jpg pwa_icon.png hud_background.png www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
